description:
Model a single-story residential building with a hip roof using SketchUp Make 2017. Building specifications:
- Footprint: 12 meters x 8 meters (12m along the red/X axis, 8m along the green/Y axis)
- Wall height (eave height): 3 meters
- Roof type: Hip roof (four sloping faces meeting at a central ridge)
- Roof pitch: 30 degrees from horizontal on all four sides (ridge sits ~2.31m above eave, making total height ~5.31m)

Ensure the model units are set to meters. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\hip_roof_building.skp'.
